full_text:
Zhang Yan 張延
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Yan (張延)was born in Xiuwu county, Henei commandery. An excellency, he was Zhang Fan’s father. Zhang Yan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
